title: MeshCentral RMM-abuse C2 on Aeza-staged payloads
summary: A MeshCentral C2 reached by MeshAgent and a .NET stub payload both staged in the same Aeza open directory — RMM software repurposed as remote-access C2.
detail: An abused MeshAgent (legitimate MeshCentral RMM, ~31/VT) and a .NET stub (stager2.exe, trojan.msil) recovered from the same Aeza open directory both contact this MeshCentral C2, evidencing RMM-as-C2 tradecraft alongside the NetSupport and Remcos activity staged on the same operator infrastructure.
